title: satureja vulgaris subsp. orientalis
intro: Satureja vulgaris subsp. orientalis, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja vulgaris plant, which is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Eastern Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Satureja vulgaris subsp. orientalis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, skin problems, and other health conditions.
